log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Vampire — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vampire — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vampire — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Vampire — Bardic Musician HP: 56/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Vampire — Bardic Musician HP: 43/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Vampire — Bardic Musician --- HP: 43/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Vampire — Bardic Musician --- HP: 43/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL! 3 psychic damage. HP: 175/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 175/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vampire — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vampire — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Vampire — Bardic Musician HP: 32/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Vampire — Bardic Musician HP: 11/67
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Vampire — Bardic Musician HP: -8/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vampire — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vampire — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Vampire — Bardic Musician HP: 50/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Vampire — Bardic Musician HP: 25/67
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Vampire — Bardic Musician HP: 14/67
--- Vampire — Bardic Musician --- HP: 14/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (14/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Vampire — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vampire — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vampire — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Vampire — Bardic Musician HP: -7/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Vampire — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
